_notes: feature_endpoints[] holds GETs the runner asserts return 2xx.
The three projection paths are served by the proxy itself off the
in-memory projection cache, with no Host header or User-Agent
filtering. They are safe to assert as 2xx for any caller.
The smoke runner does not currently parse the body, so XSD / JSON
schema validation is wired into the licensing-conformance CI
audit_check stays false until the OSS audit endpoint lands.
